zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Calston於1400年12月6日出生在英國維爾爾拉姆斯波利時，她的父親Thomas Calston39歲，母親Joan Childrey25歲。她於大約1415年與Sir William Darell在英國維爾爾利特萊可特 白 伍頓 巴塞特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1464年1月8日在英國英格蘭維爾爾享年63歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾拉姆斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Calston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name perhaps from Walsden (Yorkshire, formerly in Lancashire). The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Walsa, Wæls, or Walh (genitive Wales) + Old English denu ‘valley’.
Scottish: habitational name from Walston Lanarkshire. The placename is from Scots wall ‘well’, with a connecting or perhaps plural -s-, + toun ‘farm, village’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Calston was born on 6 December 1400, in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Thomas Calston, was 39 and her mother, Joan Childrey, was 25. She married Sir William Darell about 1415, in Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 8 January 1464, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Calston est née le 6 décembre 1400, à Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Calston, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan Childrey, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Darell environ 1415, à Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 janvier 1464, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat um 1415 in Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, England Sir William Darell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Januar 1464 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Calston è nata il il 6 dicembre 1400 nel Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Calston, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Joan Childrey, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Darell circa 1415, nel Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 8 gennaio 1464, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Calstonが1400年12月6日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアラムスブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Calstonは39歳，母Joan Childreyは25歳であった。約1415年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアリットレコット ビー ウットオン バセットでSir William Darellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1464年1月8日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで63歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアラムスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire: 영국 윌츠히르 리틀렉트 비 보턴 배싯
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Calston(이)가 1400년 12월 6일 영국 윌츠히르 램스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Calston(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Childrey(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1415년 영국 윌츠히르 리틀렉트 비 보턴 배싯에서 Sir William Darell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 램스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.6 December 1400–8 January 1464: 6 de dezembro de 1400–8 de janeiro de 1464
pt.Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire: Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Calston nasceu em 6 de dezembro de 1400, em Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Calston, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joan Childrey, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Darell aproximadamente 1415, em Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1464, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire: литлекотт би вуттон бассетт, уилцхир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Calston родилась 6 декабря 1400 г. в местности рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Calston было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Childrey, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Darell около 1415 г. в местности литлекотт би вуттон бассетт, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 8 января 1464 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Calston nació el 6 de diciembre de 1400, en Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Calston, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Joan Childrey, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir William Darell aproximadamente 1415, en Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 8 de enero de 1464, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
